# docs(specs): add kaizen-interpretability.md for InterpretabilityDiagnostics

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `21f1e0c9e7ee` — docs(specs): add kaizen-interpretability.md for InterpretabilityDiagnostics

**Body**:

Domain truth for the open-weight-LLM interpretability adapter landed in
kailash-kaizen 2.8.0 (PR#4 of 7 for issue #567). Per rules/specs-authority.md
MUST Rule 3, this is the detailed authority — every nuance, constraint,
and edge case captured so downstream implementers never drift.

§1 scope — 5 in-scope items (adapter, Protocol conformance, 4 analyses,
bounded memory, open-weight refusal, local-files-only default,
cross-SDK contract) + 6 out-of-scope boundaries.

§2 Protocol conformance — the 5-item MUST contract with byte-for-byte
report() return shapes for both "real" and "not_applicable" modes.

§3 public API — construction contract, context-manager semantics,
4 analysis methods (attention_heatmap / logit_lens / probe /
sae_features), plotting surface, API-only refusal semantics.

§4 extras gating — pyproject contract + the 5 _require_* helpers that
MUST raise ImportError naming pip install kailash-kaizen[interpretability].

§5 VRAM budget — dtype guidance, window deque cap, close() on exit,
partial-GPU-probe fallback to CPU.

§6 observability — 8 log events with interp_* domain-prefixed fields
per observability.md MUST Rule 9 (LogRecord attribute-collision
contract), no raw prompt text emitted.

§7 security threats — 6 threats each with explicit mitigation:
silent download / hardcoded HF token / prompt content in logs /
arbitrary code execution / VRAM exhaustion / API-only fabrication.

§8 testing contract — Tier 1 + Tier 2 must-cover lists, collect-only
gate, medical-metaphor sweep.

§9 attribution — MLFP donation history + kailash-py issue #567 PR#4.

§10 cross-SDK — structural divergence (no Rust counterpart); Protocol
interop contract.

§11 deprecation & forward compat — transformers / sae-lens floor caps,
mode key reserved, API-only prefix list is backward-compat append-only.

Also updates specs/_index.md to reference the new file in the Kaizen
table.

Refs #567 (PR#4 of 7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
